name: macos-tweaks
title: macOS Tweaks
description: Discover and toggle hidden macOS settings without the Terminal. Browse a curated catalog of defaults write tweaks for Finder, Dock, Screenshots, Animations, and more.
author: Undolog

commands.name: browse-tweaks
commands.title: Browse Tweaks
commands.subtitle: macOS Tweaks
commands.description: Browse and toggle hidden macOS settings by category

commands.name: my-tweaks
commands.title: My Tweaks
commands.subtitle: macOS Tweaks
commands.description: View and manage your modified macOS settings

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Tweaks Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: macOS Tweaks
commands.description: Quick access to your modified tweaks from the menu bar

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
